description_long: This is a large, multi-story department store building with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The facade is clad in brown brick with large, evenly spaced windows on each floor, and the ground level features a series of tall display windows and entryways. Architectural details include decorative cornices and pilasters, giving the building a classic, early 20th-century urban commercial appearance. A smaller, attached structure with a similar brick finish is visible on one side, possibly serving as an annex or service entrance. The roof is slightly overhanging and appears to be made of dark, weathered material. The overall structure is imposing and designed to accommodate significant foot traffic and retail activity.
description: A large, multi-story brick department store with tall windows, decorative cornices, and a flat, overhanging roof. The building features a classic urban commercial style with a smaller annex attached.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main facade with large display windows and the entrance, as well as the attached smaller annex on the left.
description_view_1: This view highlights the broad side of the building, showing the repetitive window pattern and the full length of the main structure.
description_view_2: The rear and side of the building are visible, with less architectural detail and more shadowed surfaces.
description_view_3: A top-down angle reveals the flat roof, the annex's position, and the building's overall footprint.
